Appearances:
Kiran Bhat of Keller Postman (305.845.4684, kiran.bhat@kellerpostman.com) for petitioner and moving party;
P. Craig Cardon of Sheppard Mullin (310.228.3700, ccardon@sheppardmullin.com) for respondent and opposing party

Argued and the court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The motion to relate or stay is denied without prejudice. The case is not complex, and law and motion matters in this case will be heard in this department. Petitioner does not seek consolidation. The court can continue to informally coordinate Case No. CGC-26-635233 with this case without the need for a formal order. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Kelly Lawton, CSR 15084 (941.623.5415, kjlrpr@gmail.com) (301/CVA)
